deck_title: Discovery Compass: Making Music Discovery Intent-Aware
subtitle: Evidence, product decision, prototype, and validation plan
decision_requested: Approve interviews, catalog expansion, and a paired baseline-versus-guided evaluation before considering production integration.

design_system.font_heading: Avenir Next Heavy, Arial Bold, sans-serif
accessibility: Do not use color as the only status indicator
Every chart includes direct labels and values
Avoid red-versus-green comparisons without icons or text
All citations and artifact references are hyperlinks
